summary: Tested Norma Core Engine refactoring. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Draft 2025/2026 zone limits verified (A/B: 2.6, C: 1.75, D: 1.67, E: 1.30, F: 1.00). New validation endpoints working: POST /api/certificazioni/{id}/validate, POST /api/sicurezza/{id}/validate, POST /api/sicurezza/{id}/suggest-dpi. CEValidator correctly rejects incomplete certs with 422 on PDF generation. SafetyValidator correctly identifies missing DPI for selected risks. Frontend 4-step Certificazioni wizard loads with thermal calculator showing correct zone limits and warnings.

backend.GET /api/certificazioni/thermal/referenc: PASS - Returns Draft 2025/2026 zone limits (A: 2.6, B: 2.6, C: 1.75, D: 1.67, E: 1.30, F: 1.00)
backend.POST /api/certificazioni/thermal/calcula: PASS - D: False, E: False (new stricter limits)
PASS - Uw=6.29, all zones fail with warnings
backend.POST /api/certificazioni/{cert_id}/valid: PASS - Returns 3 errors for missing fields
backend.POST /api/sicurezza/{pos_id}/validate: PASS - Returns missing_dpi list for incomplete POS
backend.CRUD certificazioni: PASS - List, Create, Read, Update, Delete all working

frontend.Dashboard after auth: PASS - Workshop Dashboard loads with KPIs
frontend.Certificazioni CE 4-step wizard: PASS - Steps: Progetto, Norma, Specifiche, Calcolo Termico
frontend.Ecobonus warning: PASS - Red 'NON detraibile Ecobonus' badge and warning text

critical_code_review_comments: Core engine architecture well organized - ZONE_LIMITS is Single Source of Truth in climate_zones.py
services/thermal_calc.py correctly serves as thin wrapper preserving backward compatibility
CEValidator properly checks standard-specific mandatory fields (EN 1090-1 vs EN 13241)
SafetyValidator RISK_DPI_MAP is comprehensive for common metalworking risks

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All thermal calculator and dashboard features verified)

test_credentials: Created temp test users via MongoDB, cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: None - all test data cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Norma Core Engine refactoring complete and verified. Draft 2025/2026 zone limits in effect (D was 1.80 now 1.67, C was 2.10 now 1.75, A/B was 3.20 now 2.60). CEValidator gates PDF generation for incomplete certs (422 error). SafetyValidator provides DPI suggestions based on selected risks. Thermal endpoints are PUBLIC, validation endpoints require auth. services/thermal_calc.py is now a thin wrapper over core.engine.thermal.
